<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The current date and time</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="quarter" data-text="quarter(date_value) gets the quarter from a date (1-4). date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">quarter(date_value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=quarter%28%5Bhire_date%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the quarter from a date (1-4).</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>quarter([hire_date])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">1</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [hire_date] is 2021-03-15</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>date_value</code> — The date column or expression to extract the quarter from</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The quarter as a number (1-4)</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="second" data-text="second(date_value) gets the second from a datetime. date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">second(date_value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=orders&amp;expr=second%28%5Border_date%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the second from a datetime.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>second([order_date])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">45</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [order_date] is 2024-01-15 10:30:45</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>date_value</code> — The datetime column or expression to extract the second from</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The second as a number (0-59)</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="start_of_month" data-text="start_of_month(date_value) gets the first day of the month for a given date. date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">start_of_month(date_value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=start_of_month%28%5Bhire_date%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the first day of the month for a given date.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>start_of_month([hire_date])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">2021-03-01</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [hire_date] is 2021-03-15</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>date_value</code> — The date column or expression to get the start of month for</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The first day of the month</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="today" data-text="today() gets the current date. date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">today()</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=today%28%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the current date.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>today()</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <span class="fn-result">the current date</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The current date</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="week" data-text="week(date_value) gets the iso week number from a date (1-53). date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">week(date_value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=week%28%5Bhire_date%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the ISO week number from a date (1-53).</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>week([hire_date])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">11</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [hire_date] is 2021-03-15</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>date_value</code> — The date column or expression to extract the week from</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The week number as a number (1-53)</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="weekday" data-text="weekday(date_value) gets the day of the week from a date (1=monday, 7=sunday). date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">weekday(date_value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=weekday%28%5Bhire_date%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the day of the week from a date (1=Monday, 7=Sunday).</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>weekday([hire_date])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">1</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [hire_date] is 2021-03-15, a Monday</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>date_value</code> — The date column or expression to extract the weekday from</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The day of the week as a number (1-7)</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="year" data-text="year(date_value) gets the year from a date. date &amp; time">
<header><code class="fn-sig">year(date_value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=year%28%5Bhire_date%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Gets the year from a date.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>year([hire_date])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">2021</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [hire_date] is 2021-03-15</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>date_value</code> — The date column or expression to extract the year from</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The year as a number</li></ul></details>
</article>
</div>
</section>

<section class="fn-category" id="type-conversion" data-cat="type-conversion">
<h2>Type Conversion <span class="fn-count">(8)</span></h2>
<div class="fn-grid">
<article class="fn-card" id="to_boolean" data-text="to_boolean(value) converts a column or value to true or false. non-zero numbers and text like &quot;true&quot;, &quot;yes&quot;, &quot;t&quot; or &quot;y&quot; become true; zero and text like &quot;false&quot;, &quot;no&quot;, &quot;f&quot; or &quot;n&quot; become false. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_boolean(value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=orders&amp;expr=to_boolean%28%5Bquantity%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Converts a column or value to true or false. Non-zero numbers and text like &quot;true&quot;, &quot;yes&quot;, &quot;t&quot; or &quot;y&quot; become true; zero and text like &quot;false&quot;, &quot;no&quot;, &quot;f&quot; or &quot;n&quot; become false.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_boolean([quantity])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">true</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [quantity] is 1</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>value</code> — The column or value to convert to a boolean</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The boolean value (true or false)</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_date" data-text="to_date(text, date_format=&#x27;%y-%m-%d&#x27;) parses a text column or value into a date. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_date(text, date_format=&#x27;%Y-%m-%d&#x27;)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=to_date%28%222023-05-15%22%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Parses a text column or value into a date.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_date(&quot;2023-05-15&quot;)</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <span class="fn-result">the date 2023-05-15</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>text</code> — The text column or value to parse as a date</li><li><code>date_format</code> — How to interpret the date text (default is &quot;%Y-%m-%d&quot;)</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The date value</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_datetime" data-text="to_datetime(s, date_format=&#x27;%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s&#x27;) parses a text column or value into a datetime. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_datetime(s, date_format=&#x27;%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S&#x27;)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=to_datetime%28%222023-05-15%2014%3A30%3A00%22%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Parses a text column or value into a datetime.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_datetime(&quot;2023-05-15 14:30:00&quot;)</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <span class="fn-result">the datetime 2023-05-15 14:30:00</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>s</code> — The text column or value to parse as a datetime</li><li><code>date_format</code> — How to interpret the datetime text (default is &quot;%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S&quot;)</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The datetime value</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_decimal" data-text="to_decimal(value, precision=none) converts a column or value to a decimal number rounded to a fixed number of decimal places. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_decimal(value, precision=None)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=orders&amp;expr=to_decimal%28%5Bprice%5D%2C%202%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Converts a column or value to a decimal number rounded to a fixed number of decimal places.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_decimal([price], 2)</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">19.99</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [price] is 19.987</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>value</code> — The column or value to convert to a decimal</li><li><code>precision</code> — How many decimal places to keep (default is None, which keeps all decimal places)</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The decimal number</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_float" data-text="to_float(value) converts a column or value to a number with decimal places. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_float(value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=orders&amp;expr=to_float%28%5Bquantity%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Converts a column or value to a number with decimal places.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_float([quantity])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">3.0</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [quantity] is 3</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>value</code> — The column or value to convert to a floating-point number</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The floating-point number</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_integer" data-text="to_integer(value) converts a column or value to a whole number, truncating any decimal places. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_integer(value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=orders&amp;expr=to_integer%28%5Bprice%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Converts a column or value to a whole number, truncating any decimal places.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_integer([price])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">19</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [price] is 19.99</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>value</code> — The column or value to convert to an integer</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The integer value (decimal places are truncated)</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_number" data-text="to_number(value) converts a column or value to a number (same as to_float). type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_number(value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=orders&amp;expr=to_number%28%5Bquantity%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Converts a column or value to a number (same as to_float).</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_number([quantity])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">3.0</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [quantity] is 3</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>value</code> — The column or value to convert to a number</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The numeric value</li></ul></details>
</article>
<article class="fn-card" id="to_string" data-text="to_string(value) converts a column or value to text. type conversion">
<header><code class="fn-sig">to_string(value)</code><a class="fn-try" href="https://edwardvaneechoud.github.io/polars_expr_transformer/#ds=employees&amp;expr=to_string%28%5Bage%5D%29" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try it ▸</a></header>
<p class="fn-desc">Converts a column or value to text.</p>
<div class="fn-example"><code>to_string([age])</code> <span class="fn-arrow">→</span> <code class="fn-result">&quot;30&quot;</code><span class="fn-ctx">when [age] is 30</span></div>
<details class="fn-params"><summary><span class="fn-toggle">▸</span> Parameters &amp; return value</summary><ul><li><code>value</code> — The column or value to convert to text</li><li><strong>Returns</strong> — The text representation</li></ul></details>
</article>
</div>
